en_title: The First Wheel of Time Board Game Adaptation Has Already Blown Past Its Goals on Kickstarter
cn_title: 《时光之轮》首款桌游改编Kickstarter超额完成目标

paragraphs.en: The Wheel of Time is one of the best-selling fantasy book series of all time, but it's a franchise that has struggled to take hold as an adaptation. Most notably, Amazon's live-action Wheel of Time show was tragically cancelled just last year after what IGN called it's "best season yet". But a new kickstarter for the first-ever official board game is bringing some fresh hope to fans of Robert Jordan's fantasy world that there's still more to look forward to.
paragraphs.cn: 《时光之轮》是史上最畅销的奇幻系列小说之一，但作为IP改编它却一直未能真正立足。最典型的例子是，亚马逊的真人剧《时光之轮》就在去年被惨痛砍掉，而那一季恰恰被IGN称为「迄今最好的一季」。不过，首款官方桌游的全新Kickstarter众筹正为罗伯特·乔丹奇幻世界的粉丝们带来一丝新希望——值得期待的内容仍在路上。

paragraphs.en: War of the Dragon is an upcoming strategy game for 2-4 players that according to the Kickstarter page, "combines tableau building, action selection, and area control mechanics in a thrilling struggle for conquest and survival". The game just launched on Kickstarter today with a funding goal of $50,000 that was pretty much immediately met. At the time of writing, almost $300K has already been pledged and those numbers continue to go up.
paragraphs.cn: 《War of the Dragon》是一款即将推出的2-4人策略游戏，根据Kickstarter页面介绍，它「将卡牌构筑、行动选择与区域控制机制融为一体，呈现一场扣人心弦的征服与生存之战」。这款游戏今天刚刚在Kickstarter上线，5万美元的众筹目标几乎瞬间达成。截至撰稿时，认筹金额已接近30万美元，并且仍在不断上涨。

paragraphs.en: This isn't the first time The Wheel of Time has been adapted for the tabletop, but it is the first actual board game for the franchise. Wizards of the Coast made a Wheel of Time TTRPG all the way back in 2001, but it has been mostly forgotten over the years. War of the Dragon is instead a full experience to the table with new illustrations, miniatures, and multiple game modes
paragraphs.cn: 这并不是《时光之轮》第一次被改编成桌面游戏，但确实是该系列首款真正意义上的桌游。早在2001年，威世智就推出过一款《时光之轮》TTRPG（桌上角色扮演游戏），但多年来基本已被遗忘。而《War of the Dragon》则是一次完整的桌面体验，配有全新插画、模型与多种游戏模式。

paragraphs.en: The popularity of this game on Kickstarter isn't too surprising thanks to the publisher that is actually adapting the story into this format. Dire Wolf is known for publishing some incredible board games like Dune: Imperium and Clank! over the years. Dune: Imperium is a somewhat similar deck-building board game that has consistently been a favorite for IGN, with our reviewer giving it a glowing 9 out of 10 review. So while War of the Dragon is getting its start as a crowdfunding campaign here, it's backed by a trusted studio.
paragraphs.cn: 这款游戏在Kickstarter上如此火爆并不让人意外，因为负责将故事改编为桌游的发行商相当有分量。Dire Wolf多年来以发行《Dune: Imperium》（沙丘：帝国）、《Clank!》等优秀桌游而闻名。《Dune: Imperium》是一款风格类似的卡牌构筑桌游，一直是IGN的心头好，我们的评测员给出了9分（满分10分）的高分好评。所以虽然《War of the Dragon》是从众筹起步，但它背后是一家值得信赖的工作室。

paragraphs.en: Outside of this Kickstarter, The Wheel of Time series has been seeing a bit of a revival in TV and games. It was announced fairly recently that a new Wheel of Time animated series and a video game are currently in the works. As of right now, there isn't any sort of release date attached to those projects, but there is an estimated June 2027 window for War of the Dragon. The Kickstarter campaign is set to run from now until June 23, 2026.
paragraphs.cn: 除了这次Kickstarter之外，《时光之轮》系列在影视和游戏领域也正迎来小复兴。不久前刚刚宣布，一部全新的《时光之轮》动画剧集和一款电子游戏正在开发中。目前这些项目都尚未公布具体发售日期，但《War of the Dragon》预计上市窗口为2027年6月。本次Kickstarter众筹将一直持续到2026年6月23日。

paragraphs.en: Jacob Kienlen is a Senior Audience Development Strategist and Writer for IGN. Born and raised in Portland, Oregon, he has considered the Northwest his home for his entire life. With a bachelor's degree in communication and 10 years of professional writing experience, his expertise is spread across a variety of different pop culture topics -- from TV series to books and the latest Pokémon games.
paragraphs.cn: Jacob Kienlen是IGN的高级受众发展策略师与撰稿人，土生土长的俄勒冈州波特兰人，毕生以美国西北部为家。他拥有传播学学士学位和10年专业写作经验，涉猎广泛，从电视剧到书籍乃至最新的《宝可梦》游戏，皆是其专长所在。
